violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) was observed with a brown/yellow biofilm The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC took out of service to clean and sanitize. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2025

The door to the outside, located at the entrance, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2025
